scripts.build:ui: cd web/frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:api: cd web/backend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.lint: echo 'linting changed (backend)...' && (cd web/backend && npm run lint) && echo 'linting changed (frontend)...' && (cd web/frontend && npm run lint) && echo 'linting mobile...' && (cd mobile && npm run lint) && echo '✅ lint passed (changed files)'
scripts.lint:all: echo 'linting backend...' && (cd web/backend && npm run lint:all) && echo 'linting frontend...' && (cd web/frontend && npm run lint:all) && echo 'linting mobile...' && (cd mobile && npm run lint:all) && echo '✅ lint passed (all files)'
scripts.typecheck: echo 'checking backend types...' && (cd web/backend && npx -y tsc --noEmit) && echo 'checking frontend types...' && (cd web/frontend && npx -y tsc --noEmit) && echo '✅ types passed'
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && echo '✅ all passed (changed lint)'
scripts.check:all: npm run typecheck && npm run lint:all && echo '✅ all passed (full lint)'
